title: Berlin in July 2026 - Quick Summary
items: **July is peak summer** in Berlin: long evenings, outdoor culture, higher hotel demand, and occasional heatwaves.
Expect average highs around **23°C**, but plan for short spells over **30°C** and sudden summer rain.
Key 2026 dates include **Fashion Week (July 2-5)**, **Classic Open Air (July 9-14)**, **Brettspiel Con (July 10-12)**, and **CSD Berlin (July 24-25)**.
Book accommodation early for **CSD weekend**, central summer weekends, Reichstag Dome slots, and ticketed open-air events.
Pack light clothes, comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen, a refillable bottle, and one thin rain layer.
